title: HardcoreLive - Texture Pack
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea07f87888cd4dac531ab74d95f49131089e9ec6.png)

## **Official Texture Pack of [**HardcoreLive**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/hardcore-live) datapack** 

- _It is necessary to have **optifine** installed for it to work perfectly._

If you have any questions, you can enter in our [**discord**](https://discord.gg/3Dwazw8H8T).

**Además, si hablas español puedes unirte a nuestro [discord](https://discord.gg/3Dwazw8H8T) para poder tener la oportunidad de participar en futuros servidores hardcore.** 😉
